Description: "Declared React states for UX highlight overlays and intermediate text coordinate inputs to prevent clamping input lockups."
Instruction: "Add the helper states after the headlineY and subtitleMarginV declarations in VerticalVideoSuitePortal.tsx"
TargetContent: "  const [headlineY, setHeadlineY] = useState(80); // in preview pixels (0 to 480)\n  const [subtitleMarginV, setSubtitleMarginV] = useState(60); // in preview pixels from bottom"
